caption: A man with a grey, spiked wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing on racks. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and white suspenders. In front of him is a black professional microphone. On the left side of the screen, a logo reads "THE STUDIO PODCAST," and on the right, text reads "GOSS TALK JOY." The man is speaking and gesturing with his hands, which are partially visible in the final frames. His facial expression shifts as he talks, moving from a slightly open mouth to a more concentrated look. The background remains static, showing a collection of photos and items like a "LEE" brand tag, while the man's subtle movements indicate an ongoing conversation during a podcast recording.
